cases.title: Disambiguate a common member name
cases.prompt: Find all usages of the key property on Feature, not every key in the repo. List each call site with file path and line number.
cases.expected_output: A usage list scoped to the exact member identity.
expectations: Resolves the member with containingType or fileHint before scanning usages
Result set is scoped to Feature.key — does not include unrelated types
Does not use raw text search (grep/rg) as the primary identity mechanism
Reports at least 3 distinct usage sites with file paths

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for member identity precision

cases.title: Disambiguate callers of a common function name
cases.prompt: Find callers of ConditionalValue.ContextualResolver.resolve(), not every function named resolve in the project. Show the call hierarchy.
cases.expected_output: A call hierarchy rooted at the exact function identity.
expectations: Disambiguates the function using containingType, kind, or fileHint
Does not silently pick one of multiple candidates without disambiguation
Reports callers specific to the target class, not unrelated resolve() calls

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for function caller precision

cases.title: Prove exhaustive cross-workspace references
cases.prompt: Find every reference to FlagValue across the entire workspace. Tell me whether the search was exhaustive — did it cover every candidate file, or was it sampled/truncated?
cases.expected_output: A complete reference report with explicit search completeness metadata.
expectations: Reports searchScope.exhaustive status or equivalent completeness metadata
Lists references grouped by file
Does not claim completeness without structural proof from the tool
Finds references in at least 2 different modules

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for completeness evidence

cases.title: Trace every sealed hierarchy implementation
cases.prompt: List every implementation of the sealed interface Konstrained. For each implementation, show its file location and which module it belongs to.
cases.expected_output: A semantic subtype report with module attribution.
expectations: Uses semantic resolution (not grep for 'class.*Konstrained') to find implementations
Lists all sealed subtypes with their file paths
Correctly identifies which module each implementation lives in
Does not miss implementations in other modules

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for sealed hierarchy completeness

cases.title: Safely rename a symbol across files
cases.prompt: Rename NamespaceRegistry to FeatureRegistry across the entire workspace. Show me the edit plan before applying. After applying, confirm no compile errors were introduced.
cases.expected_output: A multi-file rename plan and validated post-edit status.
expectations: Uses kast_rename (not find-and-replace or sed)
Shows an edit plan listing all affected files before applying
Updates import statements, not just the declaration
Runs diagnostics or reports compile status after the rename
Does not leave broken references in any module

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for safe rename mutation

cases.title: Edit and validate atomically
cases.prompt: Add a @Deprecated annotation with message 'Use FeatureRegistry instead' to the NamespaceRegistry interface declaration. Confirm the file still compiles after the edit.
cases.expected_output: A validated edit report with diagnostics evidence.
expectations: Uses kast_write_and_validate (not raw edit/create tool)
Runs diagnostics atomically as part of the write
Reports clean or dirty compile state after the edit
Does not claim success without validation evidence

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for atomic edit validation

cases.title: Summarize a large class structurally
cases.prompt: Summarize the public API of EvaluationDiagnostics — list every public type, interface, enum, and data class it contains, with their member signatures.
cases.expected_output: A scaffold-rooted API summary for a large class.
expectations: Uses kast_scaffold (not raw file read) as the primary information source
Lists all nested sealed interfaces and enums accurately
Does not hallucinate members that don't exist
Produces the summary in fewer tokens than reading the raw file would require

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for structural token efficiency

cases.title: Discover modules in one semantic call
cases.prompt: List every module in this workspace and how many Kotlin source files each contains.
cases.expected_output: A module inventory with Kotlin source file counts.
expectations: Uses kast_workspace_files (not recursive ls/find)
Reports the correct module names: konditional-types, konditional-engine, konditional-json
Reports file counts for each module
Completes in a single tool call (not iterative directory traversal)

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for workspace discovery efficiency

cases.title: Trace two-level deletion impact
cases.prompt: I want to delete ConditionalValue.ContextualResolver.resolve(). Show me every direct caller, then for each caller show its callers (depth 2). Identify which of those callers are in test files vs production code.
cases.expected_output: A bounded depth-2 caller impact report with production/test classification.
expectations: Resolves the exact function before tracing callers
Shows a 2-level call hierarchy
Distinguishes test files from production files
Reports truncation metadata if the hierarchy was bounded

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for compound impact analysis

cases.title: Trace cross-module symbol flow
cases.prompt: Trace how FlagValue flows from its definition in konditional-json/src/main/kotlin/io/amichne/konditional/internal/serialization/models/FlagValue.kt to its consumers in other modules. Show the cross-module dependency chain.
cases.expected_output: A concrete file-to-file flow report across module boundaries.
expectations: Uses scaffold + references + callers in sequence (not grep)
Identifies consumers in at least one other module
Shows concrete file-to-file relationships, not just module names
Does not miss cross-module references

source.summary: Value-proof plan case for compound cross-module tracing
